title: Premium Landing Page
description: Long-horizon business workflow that discovers the brief, develops conversion strategy, builds a premium multi-file HTML project artifact, validates it, and presents the live result for review.

nodes.title: Landing Brief
nodes.prompt: Collect the business objective, audience, offer, proof, visual direction, constraints, Notion parent page, and Drive destination.

humanQuestions.question: What business, offer, audience, and primary conversion should this landing page serve?
humanQuestions.placeholder: Include the offer, ICP, proof, objections, and desired action.

humanQuestions.question: What visual direction, brand constraints, references, or accessibility requirements should guide the premium design?
humanQuestions.placeholder: Describe tone, color, typography, imagery, and constraints.

humanQuestions.question: What specific proof, claims, pricing, FAQs, or form fields must appear?
humanQuestions.placeholder: Include only factual claims we may publish; label anything still unknown.

nodes.title: Conversion Strategy
nodes.prompt: Create a rigorous premium landing strategy. Preserve all business facts and integration destination IDs. Be detailed enough for implementation and later long-horizon verification.

nodes.title: Build Project
nodes.prompt: Build the complete HTML-first multi-file project. Write premium copy and implementation code, not generic placeholders. Keep the form local-only with excellent client-side UX; do not call Notion, Drive, a database, or any network service. Return only the delimiter-based project file bundle specified by the builder role, with raw complete content for every file and no Markdown fences or prose. Omit PDF content; the runtime handles typed document generation separately.

nodes.title: Landing Review
nodes.prompt: Show the QA status and ask for a decision on the rendered HTML. Suggest: (A) Approve the landing page, (B) Request targeted edits, (C) Hold this version.
